title: Kerala Assembly polls: Three-way contest sharpens in Vattiyurkavu amid high-decibel campaigning
description: While LDF candidate V.K. Prasanth seeks continuity highlighting the development projects he had undertaken, UDF’s K. Muraleedharan, a former MLA from the segment, says he has been a constant presence in the constituency. NDA's R. Sreelekha says the front will surpass expectations, pointing to "the encouraging response on the ground"
